attributes.title: [InfluxDB OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level overview of InfluxDB health: instance capacity, HTTP traffic, query controller load, storage health, and Go runtime.

This dashboard provides a high-level view of InfluxDB health:
- Instance capacity (buckets, orgs, uptime)
- HTTP API request rate and traffic
- Query controller load and memory headroom
- Storage health (WAL, cache, compaction)
- Go runtime (heap, goroutines)
